PRODUCTION SOFTWARE · SINCE OCTOBER 2010

Software that survives contact with production.

For 15 years we’ve shipped systems that handle real load, real money, and real compliance — from a nation’s central bank to HIPAA healthcare SaaS to marketplaces at 500K+ daily transactions.

TRUSTED BY CENTRAL BANKS, MARKETPLACES & FUNDED TEAMS

Including Nepal Rastra Bank — Nepal's central bank — and 100+ businesses across 4 continents since 2010.

The team behind your build

Founder-led since 2010. In-house. Built for production.

E Multitech Solution was founded in Kathmandu by Roshan Subedi in October 2010. Fifteen years later, our in-house team has delivered hundreds of projects for clients worldwide — from prototypes and internal systems to long-running production platforms — from Nepal’s central bank legal system to multi-tenant procurement SaaS used by European public agencies. Our auction platform holds a 4.8★ rating on Capterra across 25 verified client reviews.

production software

worldwide

Since Oct 2010
WHAT WE BUILD

AI, Software & Platform Engineering Services

Six core practices powering production systems for startups, scale-ups, and enterprise — from AI prototypes to multi-tenant SaaS that handle millions of transactions.

AI Solutions & Automation

We embed AI and agentic automation into business workflows — predictive models, intelligent decisioning, and AI-augmented products built for environments where accuracy directly impacts revenue.

Proven in production · HIPAA AI home-care SaaS (US)

Learn more →

Custom Software Development

We architect transaction-heavy platforms — fintech, live booking systems, marketplaces, and enterprise tools — engineered to perform under real production load, not just in dev environments.

Proven in production · Nepal’s central bank litigation system

Learn more →

SaaS Product Development

Multi-tenant SaaS platforms with subscription billing, role-based access, and enterprise-grade scalability — built to generate and sustain real recurring revenue.

Proven in production · DiNePa procurement SaaS (EU agencies)

Learn more →

Mobile App Development

Native and cross-platform iOS / Android apps with push notifications, in-app payments, and offline support. Apps that users return to daily — built to perform.

Proven in production · Upkeep marketplace · 500K+ daily bookings

Learn more →

DevOps & Cloud Engineering

Automated infrastructure, CI/CD, and SRE for businesses where uptime is revenue. Continuous deployment, disaster recovery, and cost optimization built in from day one.

Proven in production · uptime behind 500K+ daily transactions

Learn more →

Product Engineering

End-to-end product engineering from MVP to enterprise scale. We help founders and product teams turn validated ideas into revenue-generating software.

Proven in production · Hundreds of projects delivered since 2010

Learn more →

"Excellent Work. Quality, awesome and fully knowledgeable Team. Always like to work with them. Communication is very good with E-Multitech Solution and they always understand what i need. I just need to give a word and they understand it quickly and bring all my concepts on real working software in front of me. I am very much impressed with there art of working."
Bob Brick
Miami, USA

"Great experience working with these guys. Can highly recommend. Great software and a great team to work with. They were happy to work with my designs and to accommodate changes as and when. They are always available when needed to customize my site to my requirements and answer any technical questions."
Simon Grady
United Kingdom
🇬🇧
"It Was excellent experiences to work with E-Multitech Solution. Best communication and Technically Strong. I worked with E – Multitech Solution over the last few months to build my new site. They have fully supported me throughout the process and always been responsive when I have not understood something or needed advice. They are always responsive at any day of the week. I now have a website that is functioning superbly thanks to E- Multitech Solution. I am going to work in future as well with them."

PROOF IN PRODUCTION

Case Studies

Real systems we shipped and still run — central-bank compliance, EU procurement SaaS, HIPAA healthcare, and a marketplace at 500K+ daily bookings.

Banking

Litigation Management System for Nepal Rastra Bank

Central-bank-grade legal workflow — case tracking & audit logs, 5+ years in production.

Read case study →
SaaS

DiNePa — Digital Negotiation SaaS for European Enterprise Procurement

Multi-tenant negotiation SaaS for EU procurement — 99.4% uptime over 5+ years.

Read case study →
AI · Healthcare

AI-Powered Adult Home Care SaaS — HIPAA Multi-Tenant (US, Under NDA)

HIPAA multi-tenant home-care SaaS with 6 embedded AI capabilities, for a US operator.

Read case study →
Mobile

Upkeep.pro — Service-Booking Marketplace at Scale (500K+ Daily Bookings)

Dual-sided service-booking marketplace at 500K+ daily bookings — iOS, Android & web.

Read case study →
View all case studies

Why founders pick a 15-year team over a 16-week one.

We’re the team organisations call when a system has to work — and keep working, years after launch.

1.

Founder-led delivery

Roshan Subedi (Founder & MD) personally reviews every engagement. The engineer you meet during discovery is the engineer who ships your code. No bait-and-switch onto juniors after the contract signs.

2.

In-house engineering team

Every line of your code is written by our in-house team in Kathmandu. No hidden freelancer pool, no offshore handoff, no quality roulette between sprints.

3.

15 years of production track record

Hundreds of projects delivered since 2010, for clients worldwide — from Nepal’s central bank to EU public-sector procurement to global auction operators. Every project we started, we shipped.

4.

4.8★ on Capterra — our auction software

25 verified third-party client reviews of our auction platform on Capterra, from clients across real estate, automotive, non-profit, marketing, sports, and auction industries.

5.

You speak to an engineer, not a sales rep

48-hour response guarantee. NDA on request before discovery. Your inbound enquiry routes to our technical team — no call-center, no qualification quiz, no demo deck before your first conversation.

6.

Two timezones, one team

Engineering team in Kathmandu (UTC+5:45). Local presence in Melbourne (UTC+10/+11). One project, two coverage windows — without the cost or coordination overhead of a fully distributed contractor pool.

7.

Transparent commercials

Standard MSA and SOW templates available on request before our first call. Fixed-price discovery, fixed-price MVPs, time-and-materials retainers — pick the model that fits your stage. No hidden fees, no surprise change orders.

KATHMANDU
